title: ANC - Switch from ANC Mode to Transparency Mode
scenario: Verify ANC switches OFF and its sub-setting is greyed out when Transparency Mode is turned ON in Device Settings
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Select either Adaptive or Standard ANC mode
expected: Transparency Mode is ON (with Environment selected by default on first switch). ANC is switched OFF and its previously selected value (Adaptive or Standard) is disabled/greyed out.
